generated_oml:
instance ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring external room temperature with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureMeasurementsTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal box temperature with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureMeasurementsTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring internal box temperature with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureMeasurementsTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureMeasurementsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureMeasurementsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyOptimizationEnabler, RabbitMQMessageBrokerEnabler, RaspberryPi4ControllerEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AMQP protocol message broker for real-time data transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance RaspberryPi4ControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling GPIO signals and sensor data acquisition via 1-Wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance PythonScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization of thermal model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for connecting DS18S20 temperature sensors to Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MOSFETsOptocouplersPCBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe actuation of high-power heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for model code and system documentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionSimulationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for predicting temperature dynamics in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares optimization for calibrating thermal model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight, SafetyAlertInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection based on model-derived predictions of physical twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature trends for optimizing incubator performance"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for temperature deviations beyond safety thresholds"
]

instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters derived from sensor data"
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature status for operational safety"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults based on discrepancies between model predictions and actual measurements"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed or fan actuation based on safety thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simplified thermal model with two parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed thermal model with four parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers to handle 4A current requirements"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for air circulation"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "0.03 m³ insulated styrofoam container for thermal incubator"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for heatbed and fan operations"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling high-power components"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system operation"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2, PowerSupply, PCB, RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ThermalIncubatorEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan activation) via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which executes actions using bang-bang control logic with parameters UL (upper limit), LL (lower limit), H (heating duration), and C (waiting duration) to regulate temperature."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi) facilitating communication between low-level driver (PT interaction), controller (bang-bang logic), and simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT sensors/actuators and DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') where deployed physical twin is continuously monitored and simulated using integrated models to support real-time decision-making and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through temperature uniformity experiments (Section 4.1) and residual error minimization during calibration; Model B shows improved thermal inertia prediction with discrepancies in sensor readings indicating spatial temperature variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (AMQP protocol) for communication between PT components (sensors/actuators) and DT services; 1-Wire bus for sensor data transmission to Raspberry Pi GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for wireless deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation, though no specific cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols are detailed."
]
